data.content: [Claude Opus 4.6 2026-03-26] Implementation review REJECTED. Acceptance criteria: zero ESLint max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len warnings in listed files. Current state: 99 warnings remain across 21 files. The 3 minor items from the prior review note (dead normalizers file, unused StateCreator import, listWorkflows signature) appear resolved, but the core task — eliminating all code style warnings — is incomplete. The implementation needs another pass to fix all remaining violations.
